title: Altamiranoa fusca

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Altamiranoa fusca include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
